name: Linhai Co.,Ltd.
summary: Linhai Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells motorcycles, all-terrain vehicles, mini tractors, generators, and multi-purpose engines in China and internationally. It primarily offers motorcycle-engines, small gasoline engines, mopeds, forestry machineries, fire-fighting machineries, and sprinklers for sports ground. The company was founded in 1956 and is based in Taizhou, China.
